subtitles.original: みんな、こんあずきー！
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone! Kon-AZKi!

subtitles.original: 今日は、AZKi 8thバースデーライブ「CROSSOVER」
subtitles.english: Today is the AZKi 8th Birthday Live "CROSSOVER"...

subtitles.original: 平成・令和 アニソン歌合戦にお越しいただき、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: ...Heisei vs. Reiwa Anisong Song Battle! Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: 今回は平成赤チームと
subtitles.english: This time, we are split into the Heisei Red Team...

subtitles.original: 令和青チームの2チームに分かれて、アニソンで歌合戦をやっていきます！
subtitles.english: ...and the Reiwa Blue Team for an Anisong battle!

subtitles.original: 今回ゲストのみんなも、それぞれのチームに分かれて参戦してくれます！
subtitles.english: All of our guests today will also be split into their respective teams!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグは、「#AZKi生誕ライブ2026」こちらこちら！
subtitles.english: The hashtag is #AZKiBirthdayLive2026, right here!

subtitles.original: で、ぜひですね、赤チームのここが良かったよーとか
subtitles.english: So please post about what you liked about the Red Team...

subtitles.original: 青チームのここが美しかったよーとかですね、たくさんポストお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...or how beautiful the Blue Team was! Send us lots of posts!

subtitles.original: そして、サムネイルにも書いてありますが、新衣装のお披露目と
subtitles.english: And as written on the thumbnail, we have a new outfit reveal...

subtitles.original: 重大告知もあるので、楽しみにしててください！
subtitles.english: ...and some major announcements, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、みんな、盛り上がる準備はいいかー！
subtitles.english: With that said, is everyone ready to get hyped?!

subtitles.original: おー！
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: それでは、平成・令和 アニソン歌合戦、開幕です！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's begin the Heisei vs. Reiwa Anisong Song Battle!

subtitles.original: まずは平成赤チーム、IRyS！
subtitles.english: First up is the Heisei Red Team, IRyS!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は、
subtitles.english: Her song is...

subtitles.original: アニメ『新世紀エヴァンゲリオン』より、すべての始まりとなる一曲、
subtitles.english: ...from the anime "Neon Genesis Evangelion," the song where it all began,

subtitles.original: 『残酷な天使のテーゼ』！
subtitles.english: "A Cruel Angel's Thesis"!

subtitles.original: 続いて令和青チーム、音乃瀬奏！
subtitles.english: Next up is the Reiwa Blue Team, Otonose Kanade!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は、
subtitles.english: Her song is...

subtitles.original: 『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』より、すべてを終わりに導く曲、
subtitles.english: ...from "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time," the song that brings everything to an end,

subtitles.original: 『One Last Kiss』！
subtitles.english: "One Last Kiss"!

subtitles.original: 時代を超えて交差する二つのメロディー。
subtitles.english: Two melodies crossing over time.

subtitles.original: 2曲続けてどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy these two songs back-to-back!

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のように
subtitles.english: Like a cruel angel,

subtitles.original: 少年よ 神話になれ
subtitles.english: young boy, rise to become a legend.

subtitles.original: 蒼い風がいま 胸のドアを叩いても
subtitles.english: Even though clear blue winds beat on the door of my heart,

subtitles.original: 私だけをただ見つめて 微笑んでるあなた
subtitles.english: you just smile, looking straight at me.

subtitles.original: そっとふれるもの もとめることに夢中で
subtitles.english: Too involved in yearning for something to touch,

subtitles.original: 運命さえまだ知らない いたいけな瞳
subtitles.english: your innocent eyes still know nothing of fate.

subtitles.original: だけどいつか気付くでしょう その背中には
subtitles.english: But someday you will notice that on your shoulders

subtitles.original: 遥か未来めざすための 羽根があること
subtitles.english: there are wings to guide you to the far future.

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
subtitles.english: A cruel angel's thesis will someday fly high from the window,

subtitles.original: ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
subtitles.english: if memories are betrayed by the overflowing, burning pathos.

subtitles.original: この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ 神話になれ
subtitles.english: Holding the cosmos in your arms, young boy, shine like a legend.

subtitles.original: マリア
subtitles.english: Maria

subtitles.original: マリア
subtitles.english: Maria

subtitles.original: フライ・トゥ・ヘヴン
subtitles.english: Fly to heaven

subtitles.original: マリア
subtitles.english: Maria

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Synchronization Process - A Comprehensive Review**

Okay, here's the breakdown, as I see it. The primary directive is crystal clear: I need to generate perfectly synchronized subtitles for this video segment, juggling both the original Japanese and the English translation. It's not just about getting the words right, it's about adhering to some exceptionally stringent requirements, including meticulous timing, precise formatting, and zero tolerance for "ghost" subtitles. I'm focusing on providing accurate captions, nothing less.

First, I had to immerse myself in the video's timeline. It began by identifying the segments: the introduction with title cards and VTuber visuals, music which I disregarded since the goal is providing vocal track captions. This then shifted to AZKi's entrance, followed by her spoken MC segment (which required careful transcription), then the narrator’s voiceover for IRyS and Kanade's intro. The final stage was analyzing the performance of "Zankoku na Tenshi no Teze" noting the chorus chants. The goal here wasn't just to transcribe; it was about precision: every word, every syllable.

Next, I zeroed in on the audio, breaking down the video into distinct phases. I’m focusing specifically on the vocal segments: the MC's words, the announcer's introduction, and the lyrics. Each phrase was meticulously time-stamped. I used sub-second precision (milliseconds matter here!) to capture the exact start and end of each utterance. The goal was to ensure the visual synchronization of the text in relation to the audio. This meticulous timing is non-negotiable.

Once I had the audio analyzed and segmented, I could meticulously transcribe the Japanese dialogue into corresponding, accurate English translations. This process involved a double-check to ensure that the timecodes are completely in sync with the transcription. I'm also ensuring that there aren't any overlaps in the subtitles and that no unnecessary formatting elements are included, which are easy to introduce when the process has a degree of automation. There are no CC tags needed.

A key part of the process is an absolute, unwavering adherence to the formatting guidelines. This means I'm double-checking for any errors, ensuring that the subtitle timing and text flow naturally. The priority is providing a seamless experience for the viewer, where the subtitles augment the content and don't distract from it.

Finally, I did one last check before running it through the system. Each step had to be rigorously validated to ensure that it was in line with the defined rules. No errors can escape. All the information required, like transcriptions and timings, has to be validated, and then the process can be initiated.
